text:
It does not work! Look at 12 and 22. They have
the same last digit,
but 12 is a multiple of 4 while 22 is not. Similarly
14 and 24 have
the
same last digit, but 14 is not a multiple of 4 while 24 is. Similarly, 16
and 26 or 18 a
and 2
28. What t
this
s is that by looking
 at the last
means
digit,
cannot tell
whether a number is a multiple of 4.
